info.title: aleonard.us API github
info.description: This is the API for aleonard.us

post.description:
Retrieves a JWT token if username (email) and password match

Args:
    username: The email of the user
    password: The password of the user

Returns:
    Access token

Sign in with a Google Identity Services ID token.

Verifies the token against the configured Google client id, then upserts the
user (creating one on first sign-in) and returns a JWT — the same shape as
the password flow.

get.description:
Retrieve all users from the database. Must be an admin to view all users.

Args:
    db (Session): The database session.

Returns:
    List: OutUserDisplay: A list of users.

post.description:
Create a new user in the database.

Args:
    request (InUserBase): Must include email,
    display_name (max length 16 characters), and password.
    db (Session): The database session.

Returns:
    List: OutUserDisplay: The newly created user data.

get.description:
Retrieve a user by ID from the database.
Admins can view all users, while users can only view their own account.

Args:
    uuid (str): The ID of the user.
    db (Session): The database session.

Returns:
    List: OutUserDisplay: The user data.

put.description:
Update a user's information in the database.
Admins can update any user, while users can only update their own account.

Args:
    uuid (str): The ID of the user.
    request (InUserBase): The updated user data.
    db (Session): The database session.

Returns:
    List: OutUserDisplay: The updated user data.

delete.description:
Delete a user by ID from the database.
Admins can delete any user, while users can only delete their own account.

Args:
    uuid (str): The ID of the user.
    db (Session): The database session.
    current_user (dict): The current authenticated user.

Returns:
    List: OutUserDisplay: The deleted user data.

schema.title: Response Get All Countries V1 Countries Get

post.description: Seed/refresh the full world catalog from REST Countries.

schema.title: Response Sync Countries V1 Countries Sync Post

get.description: Return one country's detail, enriching from REST Countries on first view.

schema.title: Response Get User Countries V1 Users Me Countries Get

put.description: Persist a new ranking order (drag-and-drop). Rank = position in the list.

schema.title: Response Reorder Rankings V1 Users Me Countries Rankings Order Put

get.description: Return the current user's tracker for one country (404 if not tracked).

post.description: Add a country to the user's lists (idempotent — merges list membership).

put.description: Update list membership, rank, notes, or first-visited for a country.

Place a country at an exact 1-based position in the visited ranking,
shifting the countries at and below that position down by one.

schema.title: Response Get All Movies V1 Movies Get
Response Search Movies Endpoint V1 Movies Search Get

get.description: Return one movie's full detail, enriching from OMDB on first view.

schema.title: Response Get User Movies V1 Users Me Movies Get

get.description: Return the current user's tracker for one movie (404 if not tracked).

post.description: Add a movie to the user's lists (idempotent — merges list membership).

put.description: Update list membership, rank, or notes for a tracked movie.
Persist a new ranking order (drag-and-drop). Rank = position in the list.

schema.title: Response Reorder Rankings V1 Users Me Movies Rankings Order Put

put.description:
Place a movie at an exact 1-based position in the ranked list, shifting the
movies at and below that position down by one. Works for a not-yet-ranked
movie (jump it in) or an already-ranked one (move it).

schema.title: Response Get All Games V1 Games Get
Response Get User Games V1 Users Me Games Get
Response Get All Books V1 Books Get
Response Search Books Endpoint V1 Books Search Get

get.description: Return one book's full detail, enriching from Open Library on first view.

schema.title: Response Get User Books V1 Users Me Books Get

put.description: Persist a new ranking order (drag-and-drop). Rank = position in the list.

schema.title: Response Reorder Rankings V1 Users Me Books Rankings Order Put

get.description: Return the current user's tracker for one book (404 if not tracked).

post.description: Add a book to the user's lists (idempotent — merges list membership).

put.description: Update list membership, rank, or notes for a tracked book.

Place a book at an exact 1-based position in the ranked list, shifting the
books at and below that position down by one. Works for a not-yet-ranked
book (jump it in) or an already-ranked one (move it).

schema.title: Response Get All Tv Shows V1 Tv Shows Get
Response Search Tv Shows Endpoint V1 Tv Shows Search Get

get.description: Return one show's full detail, enriching from TVMaze on first view.

schema.title: Response Get All Episodes V1 Tv Shows  Show Id  Episodes Get

post.description: Refresh the episode list from TVMaze (for ongoing shows).

schema.title: Response Sync Show Episodes V1 Tv Shows  Show Id  Episodes Sync Post
Response Get User Tv Shows V1 Users Me Tv Shows Get

put.description: Persist a new ranking order (drag-and-drop). Rank = position in the list.

schema.title: Response Reorder Rankings V1 Users Me Tv Shows Rankings Order Put

get.description: Return the current user's tracker for one show (404 if not tracked).

post.description: Add a show to the user's lists (idempotent — merges list membership).

put.description: Update list membership, rank, or notes for a tracked show.

Place a show at an exact 1-based position in the ranked list, shifting the
shows at and below that position down by one. Works for a not-yet-ranked
show (jump it in) or an already-ranked one (move it).

get.description: The current user's episode watch marks for one show.

schema.title: Response Get User Episodes V1 Users Me Tv Shows  Show Id  Episodes Get

get.description: Index endpoint that returns a welcome message.

BookRankingReorder.title: BookRankingReorder
BookRankingReorder.description: Ordered list of book (catalog) ids defining the new ranking order.

BookSummary.title: BookSummary
BookSummary.description: Lightweight book for list responses — omits the large ``description``.

CountryRankingReorder.title: CountryRankingReorder
CountryRankingReorder.description: Ordered list of country (catalog) ids defining the new ranking order.

GoogleAuthRequest.title: GoogleAuthRequest
GoogleAuthRequest.description: Payload carrying the Google Identity Services ID token (credential).

MovieSummary.title: MovieSummary
MovieSummary.description: Lightweight movie for list responses — omits the large ``plot`` field.

OutResponseBaseModel.title: OutResponseBaseModel
OutResponseBaseModel.description: All responses will have this format.

RankPlacement.title: RankPlacement
RankPlacement.description: Target 1-based position at which to place a movie in the ranked list.

RankingReorder.title: RankingReorder
RankingReorder.description: Ordered list of movie (catalog) ids defining the new ranking order.

TVRankingReorder.title: TVRankingReorder
TVRankingReorder.description: Ordered list of show (catalog) ids defining the new ranking order.

TVShowSummary.title: TVShowSummary
TVShowSummary.description: Lightweight show for list responses — omits the large ``summary``.
